meta.title: Supply Chain Chipping Attacks: When Should I Worry?
meta.description:
Monta explains what supply chain chipping attacks are and how they work, including examples such as malicious USB cables, keyboards, and other hardware components.

Asset owners will learn when / if you should worry about these attacks, typically in counterfeit products. Vendors will learn how they can work together with system integrators and asset owners to address this problem.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
